commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which

mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

commit.message:
Performance + quality: FP16 inference, single-pass embeddings, raw frame piping

- Enable FP16 half precision on YOLO detector, BoT-SORT tracker, and ReID embedder
- Merge body ReID + face embedding into single video pass (PostTracker)
- Pipe raw BGR frames to ffmpeg via stdin, eliminating lossy mp4v intermediate
- Probe source bitrate with ffprobe for quality-matched output encoding
- Add Wake Lock re-acquisition on visibility change to prevent screen lock during analysis
- Bump audio encoding to 256k AAC

commit.message:
fix: hanja import를 try/except로 안전 처리 (미설치 환경 대응)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve NaN at step 6000 — nan_to_num on tomography + lambdas 2.5%

Root cause: tomography tensors (q1, q2, phi, etc) producing NaN in bf16,
propagating through epistemic losses and corrupting model weights.

Fixes:
- Sanitize all tomography tensors with nan_to_num before loss computation
- Sanitize logits and metric tensor G unconditionally
- Wrap all individual losses with safe() (requires_grad-preserving)
- Skip backward+optimizer step on NaN loss in trainer
- Reduce lambdas from 10% to 2.5% of defaults for numerical stability
- Disable metric_regularization (eigvalsh on ill-conditioned G)

Tested: step 6000 passes cleanly (previously crashed every run)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: .env에서 검색 기본값 제거 (config.py 코드 기본값으로 통일)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.7.0 — audit enhancements, brew-upgrade, apply-defaults

security-audit.sh:
  - Bluetooth state check via system_profiler (finding: Medium)
  - Developer mode check via DevToolsSecurity (finding: Medium)
  - World-readable files scan: ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, ~/.gnupg, ~/.config/op (finding: High)
  - Sudoers NOPASSWD detection (finding: High)
  - New sections: Sensitive File Permissions, Sudoers Configuration

brew-upgrade.sh (mac-deploy-upgrade):
  - brew update → captures outdated list → brew upgrade → brew cleanup
  - Logs dated upgrade summary to private/machines/<hostname>/brew-upgrades.log
  - --dry-run shows outdated packages without installing
  - --no-casks skips cask upgrades

apply-defaults.sh (mac-deploy-defaults):
  - Screen lock: require password immediately, 5-minute screensaver
  - Screenshots: move to ~/Documents/Screenshots, disable shadows
  - Finder: show extensions, hidden files, full path in title bar
  - AirDrop: contacts only
  - Mail: disable remote image loading (tracking pixel protection)
  - Safari: no auto-open downloads, fraud warnings, full URL bar
  - Software Update: auto-check, auto-download, security data (sudo)
  - --dry-run prints each defaults write command without applying

commit.message:
Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix hero desktop layout: proportional logo, tighter spacing

Bigger logo max-width on lg (max-w-4xl), smaller settle scale (0.7),
reduced heading sizes on desktop to not dwarf logo, tighter gap
between logo and content. Mobile unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

reduce slippage 3% -> 0.5% for stablecoin MEV protection

3% slippage on USDC-to-USDC bridges is excessive — allows sandwich
attackers to extract up to $3 per $100 bridged. 0.5% is appropriate
for stablecoin-to-stablecoin swaps with tight spreads.

Also: slippage now configurable via SLIPPAGE env var, and BRAIN_MODEL
env var added to .env.template.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace Aurora Mist (violet-cyan) with Ocean Breeze (sky-blue/cyan) theme.
Updates 32 files with new color palette: primary #0ea5e9, text #0c4a6e,
border #bae6fd, background #f0f9ff. No layout or logic changes.

tighten search engine: lower APY cap to 50%, expand quote range to top 10

- yield_scanner: max_apy default 100% -> 50%. Stablecoin yields above 50%
  are almost always unsustainable incentive programs or scams. Aave/Morpho/
  Compound typically max out at 5-30%.
- marco: fetch bridge quotes for top 10 candidates (was top 5). Previously
  a great opportunity ranked #6-10 could never be evaluated because it
  lacked bridge cost data for the brain.
- tests: 58 -> 59 (test default APY cap rejects 80% yield)

Redesign: clean header, card layout, readable typography

Header
  - Remove NavigationStack title bar entirely (.toolbar .hidden)
  - Custom fixed VStack header: tram icon badge + title + count
  - No gradient text, no emoji in title — clean system colors

Month section header
  - Format changed: "yyyy년 M월" → "N월  yyyy" (e.g. "3월  2026")
  - Grouping key: "yyyy-MM" for correct alphabetic sort (Oct/Nov/Dec)
  - Font: bold month + light year, no gradient, no decoration

Card (KTXEventRow)

    ① Station names (26pt bold) — dep left, arr right with arrow center
    ② Times (18pt monospaced, ktxBlue) + gradient fade line
    ③ Meta bar: lamp · status · train · date · delete button
  - All decorative elements removed; typography drives hierarchy

commit.message:
fix stale APY bug, brain error handling, configurable model

Critical bug: brain was making decisions based on pool APY captured at
migration time (could be days stale). Now refreshes current pool APY from
live DefiLlama data each cycle by matching on pool_id or symbol+project+chain.

Also:
- brain: graceful degradation on API failure (returns hold with confidence 0
  instead of crashing the entire cycle)
- brain: model configurable via BRAIN_MODEL env var
- marco: atomic journal writes (tmp+rename pattern)
- tests: 56 -> 58 (brain error handling, no-JSON-output default)
- requirements: add pytest-asyncio

Refactor all hooks from Python to Node.js — eliminates Python runtime dependency

Converts all 11 hook scripts across 5 plugins from Python to Node.js:
- ask-before-code: SessionStart (v0.4.2)
- dev-tools: SessionStart (v0.8.2)
- feature-sprint: SessionStart (v0.8.2)
- quick-wins: SessionStart + Stop (v0.3.5)
- md-to-skill: hook_utils + 5 hooks (v0.8.6)

All hooks use Node.js built-ins only (fs, path, os, crypto).
Portable stdin reading via fs.readSync(fd=0) instead of /dev/stdin.

fix(analytics-agent): remove disallowed_tools (crashes CLI v2.1.71)

The bundled CLI in SDK v0.1.48 doesn't support --disallowedTools.
Rely on system_prompt + SDK-compliant async tools to enforce behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix double-save race, async web3 calls, atomic journal, remove dead code

- marco.py: deduct bridge cost BEFORE record_migration() so a single
  save_state() captures both the new chain and the reduced position_usd.
  Previously a crash between two saves would leave position_usd stale.
- marco.py: journal writes now use atomic tmp+rename (matching wallet
  pattern) to prevent corruption on crash.
- lifi.py: wrap ALL sync web3 calls in asyncio.to_thread via _call()
  helper — was blocking the event loop for 0.7-3.5s across 7 calls
  (allowance, get_transaction_count, get_block, eth.call, send_raw_tx).
- lifi.py: remove unused get_routes() function (dead code since inception)

commit.message:
Fix drop zone at end disappearing during drag hold

The browser was firing touchcancel when the 52px drop-zone margin
extended the list beyond the viewport, triggering a scroll attempt.
Fix: lock body overflow and touch-action during drag (dragging-active),
and use document-relative coordinates (pageY + scrollY) instead of
viewport-relative so stored rects stay valid even if scroll slips through.

Bellows: read auto_learn_rules dynamically so hot-reload works (Forge-kfu)

The autoLearnRules flag was set once at bellows construction and never

forge.yaml takes effect without restarting the daemon.

commit.message:
Add tutoring and homeschooling business references to education-social guide

tutoring.md (757 lines):
  5 business models (home 1-on-1, group centre, online, ACCA/CPA professional,
  holiday intensives) with UGX revenue examples; Uganda education system context
  (60:1 class ratios, UNEB gate-keeping, diaspora demand); full NCDC + Cambridge
  + professional qualifications table (ICPAU, ACCA, CIMA, NEBOSH, MBA);
  teaching methodology from Outdoor Learning (Beames et al., 2024): Vygotsky ZPD,
  Socratic inquiry, mastery-based progression, spaced repetition;
  3 financial scenarios: solo PT (UGX 1.4M/month) → solo FT (UGX 8.4M/month)
  → 5-tutor centre (UGX 96M/year); pricing table by level × subject × mode;
  scaling roadmap to franchise/licensing

homeschooling.md (~600 lines):
  Covers homeschooling SERVICES provider (not parent-educator); Uganda legal
  status (grey area under Education Act), UNEB private candidacy, CAIE via
  British Council Uganda; 7 universal + 5 EA-specific reasons families choose
  home education; 6 philosophies (structured, classical trivium, Charlotte Mason,
  Holt unschooling, unit studies, eclectic); 6 service models; teaching
  methodology from Garfias (2019) + Holt/Farenga (2003) + Outdoor Learning;
  3 scenarios: solo (72% margin), micro-school 10 students (57%), online 20
  students (79%); safeguarding/Children Act compliance; marketing via WhatsApp
  parent groups, church networks, expat communities

Sources: Garfias (Everything You Need to Know about Homeschooling, 2019),
  Holt/Farenga (Teach Your Own, 2003), Beames et al. (Outdoor Learning, 2024)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement dispatcher: request routing and cache orchestration

Routes DataRequest to correct Bloomberg call based on parameters:
- interval set → intraday (single security enforced)
- start + end → historical (with cache support)
- neither → reference (bulk auto-detected)

Owns cache interaction for historical: coverage check, gap fetch,
append/write, and slice for response. Includes refresh() for
cache invalidation and re-fetch.

Add 54 gradient intermediates to topology, confirm smooth transition

Fills in the gap between bare nouns and "X is cute" propositions with
intermediate phrases (cute kitten, a cute kitten, kittens are cute,
etc). The kitten gradient shows continuous progression from x=-0.08
to x=+0.29 with no cliff. The apparent sharp boundary in the previous
version was a sampling artifact. 194 concepts total, all cells valid.
